assertions.assertion: The web.app client has RequirePkce = true and does not set it to false
The web.app client redirect URIs contain no wildcards - all URIs are exact-match fully-qualified HTTPS URIs
assertions.rationale: Line 25 uses 'https://app.example.com/signin-oidc' — exact match, no wildcards.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client uses GrantTypes.Code (not CodeAndClientCredentials or Implicit)
The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime of 900 or less (15 minutes maximum)
The web.app client has RefreshTokenUsage = TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly
